naming_law: program facts (bonus_calls/commission_pct/commission_months) project from src/lib/referral-constants.ts REFERRAL_TERMS via referralTerms(); never hardcoded in the API or the bot

surfaces.auth: internal-bypass key (checkInternalBypass: BOT_INTERNAL_BYPASS_ENABLED=true + X-AlgoVault-Internal-Key == ALGOVAULT_INTERNAL_BYPASS_KEY); 401 otherwise. Bot-only (loopback).

surfaces.idempotency: one grant per TG referee (referee_email = tgIdentity(chat_id), UNIQUE) → duplicate returns {recorded:false, reason:'already_attributed', bonus_calls:0}

channel_migration: migrations/016_referral_channel_tg.sql widens referral_attributions.channel CHECK to add 'tg' (additive; pre-applied to prod PG via SSH; in-code DDL mirrors for fresh/test DBs)
data_integrity: no outcome_* exposed; raw chat_ids never persisted (opaque tg:<hash> identity lane); reuses the REFERRAL-LIGHT-W1 engine — no new tables, no Stripe/accrual change
tools_list_impact: NONE — HTTP routes only; no MCP tool added (tools/list stays 9, byte-identical)
